category_sources: source_facts.description says it discovers exposed hosts using multiple search engines; official ProjectDiscovery docs describe uncover as a Go wrapper for discovering exposed hosts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is uncover; official ProjectDiscovery documentation and GitHub repository use uncover.
docs_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery documentation has dedicated uncover overview and usage pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/projectdiscovery/uncover, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official ProjectDiscovery docs describe discovering exposed internet hosts through search-engine APIs.
